claim: Scheduler Kit targets Beta. No Stable, release, complete accessibility, temporal-correctness, package-parity, or publication claim is made.

semantics.nativeBasis: Canonical Calendar grid, native calendar filters, ordered agenda and labelled event form.
semantics.rolePolicy: Calendar owns roving grid navigation; optional status and conflict output is absent when disabled.

keyboard.key: Calendar arrow keys / Home / End / PageUp / PageDown
keyboard.behavior: Moves date focus according to the canonical Calendar contract and logical RTL direction.
Moves through filters, agenda, editor and recovery actions in document order.
Activates focused native controls and selected dates.

nonColor: Calendar labels, event titles/times, Beta text, headings and explicit conflict descriptions accompany color.
responsive: At narrow widths the agenda becomes the primary equivalent view and all editor controls reflow into one column.
consumerResponsibilities: Resolve local wall times, daylight-saving gaps/folds, recurrence and server conflicts in the adapter.
Authorize persistence and provide privacy, attendee, notification and legal policy.
Localize text and retest temporal boundaries, keyboard, touch, zoom, RTL, forced colors and assistive technologies.
Retain the Beta claim until all promotion evidence is current.
